docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VEGIWORKS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FUJIWARA, ALEXANDER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY VEGIWORKS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FUJIWARA, ALEXANDER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VEGIWORKS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FUJIWARA, ALEXANDER $5,125.00 PRINCIPAL, $4,990.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,115.00
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VEGIWORKS, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-26-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FUJIWARA, ALEXANDER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VEGIWORKS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FUJIWARA, ALEXANDER $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,125.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VEGIWORKS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FUJIWARA, ALEXANDER NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
